wikipedia tag from wikipedia tag in an outdated form
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:fa']), wikipedia tag may be added
باغ و عمارت عین‌الدوله - an affected OSM element that may be improved
failed to describe proposed relinking here (was: {'current': None, 'to': 'fa:باغ و عمارت عین\u200cالدوله'}), dump of raw proposed_tagging_changes: [{'from': {'wikipedia': None}, 'to': {'wikipedia': 'fa:باغ و عمارت عین\u200cالدوله'}}]

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(760600534)['wikidata'='Q5897559']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:fa'='باغ و عمارت عین‌الدوله']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag from wikipedia tag in an outdated form']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
subject:wikidata and subject:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because subject:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q35900 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Omar Khayyám to en:Omar Khayyam
